zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Gibbons於1585年出生在英國奧可福爾哈爾波利時，他的父親William Gibbons27歲，母親Ann Harmon27歲。他於1611年與Elizabeth Pierpont在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1656年4月25日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾分尼 康普頓享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Gibbons于1585年出生在英国奧可福爾哈爾波利时，他的父亲William Gibbons27岁，母亲Ann Harmon27岁。他于1611年与Elizabeth Pierpont在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1656年4月25日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾分尼 康普頓享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gibbons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Gibbon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Mayo): in Ireland, the name is frequent and has been Gaelicized as Mac Giobúin. It is also found as a variant of Fitzgibbon .

variants.name: Gibbens
meanings: German: patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with geba ‘gift’.

variants.name: Gibbon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Giboin (ancient Germanic Gebawin).
English: alternatively, a diminutive of the personal name   Gibb  .
Scottish and Irish: variant of   McGibbon  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Gibbons was born in 1585, in Charlbury, Oxfordshire, England, his father, William Gibbons, was 27 and his mother, Ann Harmon, was 27. He married Elizabeth Pierpont in 1611, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 April 1656, in Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Gibbons est né en 1585, à Charlbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Gibbons, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ann Harmon, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Pierpont en 1611, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1656, à Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Gibbons 1585 in Charlbury, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Gibbons 27 und seine Mutter Ann Harmon 27. Er hat 1611 in London, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Pierpont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. April 1656 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gibbons è nato il nel 1585 nel Charlbury, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Gibbons, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Ann Harmon, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Pierpont nel 1611, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 aprile 1656, nel Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Gibbonsが1585年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチャールブリーで生まれた時，父William Gibbonsは27歳，母Ann Harmonは27歳であった。1611年にイギリスイギリスロンドンでElizabeth Pierpontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1656年4月25日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフエニー コンプトンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Gibbons(이)가 1585년 영국 스퍼드실르 찰버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Gibbons(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Harmon(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1611년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Elizabeth Pierpont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1656년 4월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 펜이 콤프턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gibbons nasceu em 1585, em Charlbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Gibbons, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ann Harmon, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Pierpont em 1611, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, British: хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Gibbons родился в 1585 г. в местности чарлбури, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Gibbons было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Harmon, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Pierpont в 1611 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 апреля 1656 г. в местности фенни комптон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, England: Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Gibbons nació en 1585, en Charlbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Gibbons, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ann Harmon, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Pierpont en 1611, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de abril de 1656, en Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
